case_title: WILLIAM D. PODESTO & ASSOCIATES, AIA, INC. vs. SNYDER, LOUIS F. et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAM D. PODESTO & ASSOCIATES, AIA, INC.

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAM D. PODESTO & ASSOCIATES, AIA, INC. HEARING SET FOR AUG-11-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES, CALENDAR OF AUG-11-1994, DENIED CCP 94(A)(1).
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL COURT TRIAL SET FOR OCT-20-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01
TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 03

DEPT 03. JUDGE PRO-TEM ARNOLD EVYE. CSR: PATTI DOWLING TUCKETT. CLERK: G.SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT. PLTFF STIPULATES IN WRITING TO PRE-TEM JUDGE. ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED. PLTFF PRESENTS PRIMA FACIE CASE. COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT FOR PLTFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR $9708.96 PLUS COSTS PER COST BILL. PLTFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. EXHIBIT W/DRAWN AND RETURNED TO PLTFF.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SNYDER, LOUIS F. $9,708.96 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,708.96, PLUS INTEREST AT THE LEGAL RATE COMMENCING ON 01-SEP-94, AND CONTINUING UNTIL PRINCIPAL SUM IS PAID IN FULL, TOGETHER WITH LEGAL COSTS.
